meta.site_description: Spectacular two-acre estate overlooking the Potomac River — 7 en-suite bedrooms, 11,575 sq ft, heated pool, pavilion, and glass gazebo. Listed at $4,000,000.

tagline: A spectacular two-acre estate overlooking the Potomac River — 11,575 sq ft, seven en-suite bedrooms, and a resort-caliber amenity set on one of the area's most distinguished addresses.
description:
Welcome to a spectacular two-acre estate overlooking the Potomac River. This architectural gem boasts 11,575 total square feet and seven en-suite bedrooms — one main level primary, four upper, and two lower — on three incredibly bright, sunlit levels. You will feel this home's warmth the moment you enter, with fantastic views of the outdoors directly from its entrance vestibule.

The main level delivers elegance and comfort in equal measure. Soaring ceilings in the great room create a sanctuary of light throughout the home. A caterer's kitchen serves large engagements with ease, and a cabana bath accommodates family and guests at the pool level. The sun-filled lower level is an entertainment retreat, featuring an expansive dual-sided social area with bar, game rooms, and a custom wine room for your private collection.

Step outside to grounds designed for both quiet relaxation and grand soirées. Enjoy a dip in the heated pool or unwind in the hot tub. Dine alfresco under the pavilion or gather in the stunning glass gazebo surrounded by nature. With easy access to the Nation's Capital, this estate offers ultimate privacy, convenience, and luxury in the heart of Potomac. Private showings by appointment only.

items: Circular driveway on 2-acre lot with full privacy
Stunning glass gazebo surrounded by nature
Outdoor kitchen with BBQ grill and extensive hardscape
11,575 sq ft across three sunlit levels
Soaring ceilings in great room — floor-to-ceiling windows
Two-story marble entry foyer with stone arch vestibule
Private library with fireplace and built-ins
7 en-suite bedrooms — 1 main level primary, 4 upper, 2 lower
Jetted tub and walk-in shower in primary bath
Zoned heating and cooling — heat pump

highlights: Prestigious River Road address — 2-acre estate lot
Easy access to I-495 and downtown DC
Montgomery County Public Schools — Churchill cluster
